metadata.description: Engineering best-practice skills for Go and TypeScript

plugins.name: golang-language
plugins.description: Go naming, interfaces, package layout, and anti-patterns

plugins.name: golang-error-handling
plugins.description: ErrorX sentinel pattern, errno directory, error propagation by layer

plugins.name: golang-logging
plugins.description: Zap Sugar API, log.W(ctx) context propagation, per-layer logging rules

plugins.name: golang-architecture
plugins.description: Clean Architecture layers (handler→biz→store→model) and Google Wire DI

plugins.name: golang-testing
plugins.description: Table-driven tests, mockgen, testify assertions, benchmarks

plugins.name: golang-api-server
plugins.description: Framework-agnostic Server interface, graceful shutdown, unified response

plugins.name: golang-gin
plugins.description: Gin engine setup, middleware chain, route groups, HandleJSONRequest pattern

plugins.name: golang-echo
plugins.description: Echo framework patterns — binding, middleware, error handler

plugins.name: golang-fiber
plugins.description: Fiber/fasthttp patterns — UserContext, BodyParser, concurrency gotchas

plugins.name: golang-nethttp
plugins.description: net/http + chi router patterns — standard library HTTP server

plugins.name: typescript-language
plugins.description: TypeScript strict config, type patterns, no-any/enum/!, brand types

plugins.name: typescript-best-practices
plugins.description: Async/await, Promise.all, error handling at boundaries, Vitest testing
